S201.note: Pilot for Phases 5-8 architecture; reference implementation for the other 112 series.

stage_0.label: INVENTORY
stage_0.gate_notes: series_registry.json v0.1 written with 98 candidates; CHAPTER_FIGURE_TABLE_INDEX and SERIES_CANDIDATE_LIST in docs/chapters/; CD/CD2 crosswalks in MIGRATION/

stage_1.label: RESEARCH
stage_1.gate_notes: 114/114 dossiers PASS validator (Build/PHASE3_VALIDATION_REPORT.json). 15 per-chapter rollups in docs/chapters/CH{N}_RESEARCH_SUMMARY.md + Ch6 GPIM rollup + 4 external_studies summaries. Executed via 3 waves of 5 opus subagents (15 agent runs, ~3 hours) for the initial 98 book series, then a 4th wave of 5 agents (~1 hour) for the post-decision expansion: 9 AS Ch6 GPIM + 3 Ch7 S709-S711 + 4 ES papers (Shaikh 2020, Coronado et al 2020, Shaikh-Jacobo 2020, Weber-Shaikh 2020). Decisions 0001-0005 resolved before expansion.

stage_2.label: ADEQUACY
stage_2.gate_notes: 16/16 chapter-groups PASS validator (Build/PHASE4_VALIDATION_REPORT.json) with scores 83-100 (avg ~91). Executed via 3 waves of 5 opus subagents in parallel (15 agent runs, ~1.5 hours). Wave 1: Ch2,3,4,5,6+AS (52 series); Wave 2: Ch7+S709-711,8,9,10,11 (31); Wave 3: Ch13+17,14,15,16,ES (31). Per-series adequacy blocks merged into series_registry.json via _phase4_delta_merger.py. Decision 0006 (ES2301 5-way split) RECOMMENDS_SPLIT per ES wave; awaits user ratification before Phase 5.

stage_3.label: INGESTION
stage_3.gate_notes: 118/118 DPRs authored; series_registry.json subseries decomposition complete; SUBSOURCE_METADATA populated; ANU_LEDGER tracks all series.

stage_4.label: EXTENSION
stage_4.gate_notes: 118/118 EPRs authored. Proxy substitutions documented (BLS ILC→BIS PPI EER, Ibbotson→Damodaran, CMDEBT/PI→HCCSDODNS/DPI, etc.). No-lazy-splices rule enforced on formula/composite series.

stage_5.label: REPLICATION
stage_5.gate_notes: 118/118 L01+P02+V03 scripts authored and tested. Validator: 97 PASS, 8 PASS_THEORETICAL, 2 PASS_CROSS_SECTIONAL_UNAVAILABLE, 11 PASS_DATA_UNAVAILABLE. S00_setup architecture (config/cache/apis) + run.py orchestrator established by S201 pilot, replicated across all chapters. New API clients added: FRED, BEA stub, Damodaran NYU, Shiller, IMF SDMX 3.0, World Bank WDI, IMF WEO, Census FT900.

stage_6.label: OUTPUT
stage_6.gate_notes: 109 chopped CSVs + 109 extenbooks emitted (118 minus 9 data_unavailable series that legitimately have no chopped output: S801, S703, S704, S707, S708 chart-only; S214, S215 OECD ISDB sourceless; S404-S407 paywall + S404=PASS_DATA_UNAVAILABLE). Generic O06 writers extended to handle disambiguating keys (month, country_key, industry, cr4_midpoint, etc.) for cross-sectional series.

framework_audit.notes: anu-* skills not loaded in this session; artifacts hand-built mirroring RMWND structure
